settings.title: Say Hello to Theo Behind the Third Chair
settings.excerpt: He trained in Berlin, he is quietly brilliant with curls, and his books are now open.
settings.body:
The third chair at Shearline has a new face, and we could not be happier about it. Theo joined us this month after several years cutting in Berlin.

We met him through a former colleague and knew within one conversation that he would fit. He is calm, precise, and genuinely interested in the hair in front of him rather than a look he wants to impose.

What he is known for

He is especially good with textured and curly hair, cutting it dry so he can see how it actually falls. He also does a precise short cut that grows out beautifully, the kind that still looks deliberate two months later.

A quick sense of his strengths:

  • Curly and textured hair, cut dry.
  • Short, precise cuts built to grow out well.
  • Tidying up a grown-out style without starting from scratch.

His books are open

Theo is taking new clients now, and as an introduction his first cut comes with a complimentary deep-conditioning treatment through the end of the month. It is a nice way to meet him and let your hair settle in at the same time.

If you have struggled to find someone who really understands curls, he is well worth a try. Mention this offer when you book and we will pair the treatment with your cut.
